reviews.review_title: The best running in place app out there!
reviews.review_description: I've loved this game since it's original beta release and use it every day, but in the official new version "Run 4 Life" the locomotion is too fast (unnatural) with no way to adjust the speed. I'm not fond of the zombies either and just run in the beautifully done open world environment. It's the best out there!  If the speed gets fixed or a way to adjust it, I will gladly purchase the game and any new maps that come out. That's all I need. Like a lot of us, I'm just here to run and not be bored with my workout. I don't need a lot of fancy stuff, maybe just some animals running around and optional environments while listening to my workout tunes with appropriate tempos. Great work, please keep the maps coming.
I purchased the basic night zombie game. It sucks. I mean I can’t even figure out how to play this.

The app holds great potential, but the first (and only) available paid world needs to provide more guidance. You just run from zombies, they catch you and you die. You're trying to get to shelter, but it's not clear what that shelter is. If it's the big building with the campfire you can't get to it because it's always guarded. We need some strategy hints. Some of the other worlds look promising, but they're not available yet. They look like "Happier Runs" than the Zombie world.

reviews.review_title: If I could only change the direction
reviews.review_description: I tried to use Happy Run with my treadmill but I was unable to change the direction where I walk. I probably missed something in the instructions but I don't know why. I would really pay for a world where I can just walk freely as this apparently aims to offer...
This free demo doesn't not include enough of the game to be able to tell whether it's fun to play, safe to play on a treadmill, or anything else.

I love this Bike ride it was only £.4.99 and I was riding it for nearly a hour then the road came to an end I road up the side of some rocks the nothing 
I was just in limb sky just sky above below and either side. 
This could be an excellent fitness bike exercise if only more leves of track are put in 
And give the bike option on all modes
I loved the track 01 we need more !!! Please ❤️
Please please make more tracks for the exercise bike I
Would buy them.
This is soo good.
As for running on the spot being chased that's not so much me but if you introduced the exercise bike into the zombies chasing you that would be a perfect exercise 
Please please put excise bike in the zombie mode
Thanks

I have to say, it has so much potential! I never thought I'd be able to actually run in VR like this, but it really surprised me. As a regular runner, I usually hit the road, but the rainy season here has kept me indoors. Then, I stumbled across a developer post on Reddit, and it instantly caught my attention.

The game offers an immersive running experience that feels surprisingly natural in VR, which is impressive. However, I did have to go through a bit of a roundabout search for it; I couldn’t find it on Meta and ended up locating it through a third-party site.

With the right marketing and a clear focus on the workout audience, I think this game could be huge! One important note: this isn’t for use on a treadmill! Instead, you should be running in place

This really looks promising, if it could be paired with a cadence sensor for stationary bikes and elliptical it would be amazing. It seems to rely on head movement to move forward it I don’t naturally Bob up and down very much when jogging or walking in place so it’s difficult to get moving, not to mention bobbing around is really uncomfortable with the headset on. I could kind of make it work on elliptical, but I had to really exaggerate my head movements. Maybe just having an option to increase sensitivity/speed to match head movement would fix the issue.

reviews.review_title: I love running around in this world!
reviews.review_description:
This is so close to being exactly what I have been wanting since running on a Wii board!!

I was excited to find new things in in the world today!!
Good exercise,use often.

People are complaining about how dangerous it is on a treadmill but it's not for treadmill at all. You do this exercise inside your boundry ring. If you do it correctly then the path starts moving. Awesome 👍

I ran in my salon for the first time, and it was amazinggg! Can you do this for a bike? If the controllers are put on the legs, close to the knees, this could be a great bike trip. The only thing is that you must look up front. If you look to the sides (I got tempted as the forest has a rising sun near a lake) you move in the direction you look. Which of course, it's logic.... But I got out of the road, ouch! Loved it and it's free, and fun. So, an applause for the designer and the developer.
Very dangerous... I fell off the treadmill several times, it would have been desirable to have a window through which you could see the treadmill

reviews.review_title: Very nice idea but terribly dangerous
reviews.review_description: The idea of the app is great but in current form it is very dangerous. It would be beneficial for the app to make it at least partially AR/MR. Maybe tunnel vision where you see the VR route in the center and where you can always see you legs, hands, treadmill handles at the sides? I will gladly take a look in the future but for now I want to stay alive.

This game was unique in the fact that you can explore off trail. It also has some testing going on with Spotify which would be a nice feature. The graphics are good, too. I tried it without a treadmill, and it worked great. It has a nice pace of movement, too. Some of the games just move you too slowly through space and it gets boring.
The concept of this game is amazing, and it is implemented very well. Good for weight loss.

Lovely scenery, puts me in mind of Denara (I'm a writer; it's one of my worlds), and accessible for those with mobility issues, who can bounce rather than walk or run and still give their legs a workout. Steering's tricky, but very good fun overall. No motion sickness too!
I love this game!
for someone who don't exercise much due to limited time, this is great

I purchased the bike one, definitely needs some variations in the scenery, it's a good idea but I got bored after ten minutes it was all the same, even lots of floating trees on my travels.  Definitely has potential but at the moment it's very mundane, needs lots of work... different tracks maybe, it's like one straight line pretty much level ground, needs more excitement to it, I'm all for a relaxing bike ride but come on .... Let's have some variation 🔚
